evals.prompt: translation drops my Markdown formatting — headings and bullet lists come back as plain text
evals.expected_output: Classified as bug. Investigates the Markdown-aware translation code in src/lib/translation/. Records in docs/bugs.md with next available ID. Reports the classification to the user.
Reads docs/tasks.md 'New' section. For each item: investigates code, checks for duplicates in bugs.md and features.md, classifies, records, moves to Triaged section.

evals.prompt: can we add a tone-matching polish goal? the current goals are just clarity and grammar
evals.expected_output: Classified as feature (never implemented, or partial). Investigates existing polish goals in src/lib/polish/. Records in docs/features.md. Does NOT start implementing.

evals.prompt: switching from the Anthropic provider to Ollama fails and the result never streams in
evals.expected_output: Classified as bug. Investigates the multi-provider layer in src/providers/ and the stores that hold the active provider. Records in docs/bugs.md. Reports the classification to the user.

evals.prompt: the stream hangs when I hit abort mid-translation — the UI stays stuck on 'translating'
evals.expected_output: Classified as bug. Investigates the streaming/abort handling in src/providers/ and src/lib/translation/. Records in docs/bugs.md with next available ID. Reports the classification to the user.
